metadata.remarks: Portfolio demonstration artifact. No real federal system or authorization is represented.

set-parameters.remarks: AC-2(3) inactive accounts disabled after 45 days per FedRAMP Moderate; no agency adjustment.
AC-7 maximum invalid logon attempts before lockout.
AU-11 audit log retention. Online retention supports CA-7 ConMon dashboard; offline retention via S3 Glacier Deep Archive.
IA-5(1) minimum password length aligned to FedRAMP Moderate requirement.

resources.description: The underlying control catalog from which FedRAMP Moderate is derived.
